_doc: Real Etsy winners with verified monthly revenue. Used to populate strategy.realWorldExample with confidence (no AI hallucination) and as inspiration for what's working in each category. is_recommended=false entries are kept as cautionary examples - they earn well but face IP enforcement risk.

winners.name: Amber Table Lamp
winners.why_it_sells: Premium aesthetic lamp; warm amber glow is on-trend in home decor; very high perceived value.
winners.differentiator: Highest sustained monthly revenue in this list. Complex print commands premium price; photography is make-or-break.

winners.name: Crossbow Dice Roller and Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Mechanical design with high perceived value; DnD community is passionate and high-spending.
winners.differentiator: Original mechanical design - no IP risk. Excellent bundle potential with dice sets.

winners.name: Mystic Conch Shell Dice Storage
winners.why_it_sells: Unique decorative gaming accessory; high perceived value; dice storage inside adds function.
winners.differentiator: Original design with no IP risk. Strong photography potential. Excellent bundle piece with a dice set.

winners.name: Personalized Headphone Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Premium desk accessory + personalisation = strong gift; popular with gamers and WFH buyers.
winners.differentiator: Custom name engraving justifies premium price; Q4 gift spike. Same product from another seller earned 5–10× less, proving photography and SEO determine outcome.

winners.name: The Glitch Fidget Slider
winners.why_it_sells: Mechanical fidget satisfies tactile need; professional aesthetic appeals to adults not just kids.
winners.differentiator: Original multi-layer mechanism - hard to replicate without engineering skill. Two sellers with the same design had 5× revenue gap based on listing quality alone.

winners.name: Water Dispenser Lever (Replacement)
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a frustrating real problem; exact-fit replacement; near-zero competition.
winners.differentiator: Possibly the highest return per gram of filament in this list - simple print with massive demand. Strongest argument for the replacement parts niche.

winners.name: Break Glass in Case of Emergency
winners.why_it_sells: Humorous novelty; perfect low-cost gift; huge impulse-buy appeal.
winners.differentiator: Low filament cost; extremely fast print; viral social media potential.

winners.name: Mini TV Apple Watch Charging Station
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a real problem elegantly; nostalgic mini-TV form factor makes it highly giftable.
winners.differentiator: Unique form factor with strong gifting angle; evergreen as long as Apple Watch sells.

winners.name: HomePod Mini Outlet Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Saves desk space; outlet-mount is a clever functional solve; Apple ecosystem buyers are loyal.
winners.differentiator: Niche but loyal buyer base; low print time; functional need with no Amazon alternative. v2 listing earned 3× more than v1 - better photography/SEO is the difference.
winners.notes: Avoid Apple logo or 'Designed for Apple' phrasing.

winners.name: Flipper Zero WiFi Dev Board Case
winners.why_it_sells: Exact-fit case for a cult hacker/maker device; passionate technical community with disposable income.
winners.differentiator: No IP risk; niche maker audience is loyal and active; low Etsy competition; evergreen as long as Flipper Zero sells.

winners.name: Designer Toilet Paper Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Functional replacement product with design angle; every bathroom needs one.
winners.differentiator: Low competition for unique shapes; replacement market = high buyer urgency.

winners.name: Capybara Dice Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Trending animal meets DnD accessory; double-niche drives strong conversion from two audiences.
winners.differentiator: Trend-aware design in an evergreen niche; pairs well with a matching dice tray for AOV uplift.

winners.name: Gas Can Christmas Ornament
winners.why_it_sells: Petrolhead gifting; strong humour and novelty angle; Christmas ornament seasonal spike.
winners.differentiator: Q4 spike (Oct–Dec); low filament cost; obvious gift for car/truck enthusiasts with near-zero competition.

winners.name: iPhone MagSafe Weighted Ball Charger Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Premium feel; weighted base prevents tipping; clean minimal aesthetic.
winners.differentiator: Material weight = perceived premium. MagSafe market is evergreen with each new iPhone generation. Older listing still converting strongly proves sustained demand.
winners.notes: Avoid Apple/MagSafe logos in product photos.

winners.name: KitchenAid Tool Holder Set of 3
winners.why_it_sells: Exact fit for a beloved premium appliance; KitchenAid owners are loyal and high-income.
winners.differentiator: Buyers of a €300+ appliance pay for quality. Set of 3 boosts AOV significantly. Low IP risk: avoid the KitchenAid wordmark and rely on 'fits stand mixers' phrasing.
winners.notes: Use generic phrasing like 'fits stand mixer'; do not imply official affiliation.

winners.name: Ford F-150 MagSafe Phone Mount
winners.why_it_sells: Exact-fit vehicle mount; F-150 is the best-selling vehicle in the USA - huge addressable market.
winners.differentiator: Hyper-niche exact fit = near-zero competition. Strong repeat angle for truck owners upgrading phones.
winners.notes: Avoid Blue Oval or F-150 logo in photos. Use 'fits 2015–2020 F-150' phrasing.

winners.name: Dyson Accessory Holders (set of 6)
winners.why_it_sells: Exact-fit for a premium Dyson vacuum; organises expensive accessories buyers already own.
winners.differentiator: Set of 6 = high AOV; Dyson owners are high-income and loyal; evergreen as long as Dyson sells.
winners.notes: Dyson does not actively pursue third-party accessory makers. Avoid 'Dyson' in title; use 'fits V8/V10/V11'.

winners.name: Hello Neighbour Lock and Key Puzzle
winners.why_it_sells: Playful puzzle mechanic; satisfying unboxing; strong gift appeal.
winners.differentiator: Mechanical design moat - hard to copy without understanding the mechanism.

winners.name: Baby First Mjolnir (Thor Hammer Rattle)
winners.why_it_sells: Clever mashup: baby rattle + Marvel reference = perfect geek parent gift; highly shareable.
winners.differentiator: Geeky parent niche is underserved and willing to pay. Mjolnir is a grey-area IP because of Norse mythology origin.
winners.notes: Generic rounded-hammer design with no Marvel logo is lower risk than MCU-style replicas.

winners.name: Apple HomePod Mini + Echo Dot Combo Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Solves multi-device desk clutter; appeals to smart home buyers who own both devices.
winners.differentiator: Combo stand = premium price justification. Smart home market growing; differentiated from single-device stands.

winners.name: Mini Barbell Squat Rack Pen Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Gym culture novelty gift; instantly shareable; obvious gifting angle for fitness lovers.
winners.differentiator: Very fast print; low filament cost; strong social media shareability; evergreen gym community.

winners.name: Dyson Vacuum Adapter for Ruggable Rug
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a specific Dyson + Ruggable incompatibility; very targeted buyer with no other option.
winners.differentiator: Near-zero competition; buyer is motivated and price-tolerant; exact-problem solve.

winners.name: MagSafe Desk Mount
winners.why_it_sells: Clean minimal desk organisation; MagSafe is Apple ecosystem standard used by millions.
winners.differentiator: Functional evergreen product; low filament cost; easy to photograph cleanly on white desk.

winners.name: Raised Slow-Feeder Pet Bowl
winners.why_it_sells: Functional pet health accessory; vet-recommended slow feeding is a growing buyer-driven trend.
winners.differentiator: Underserved sub-niche. Use food-safe PETG or resin and add a clear material disclaimer to overcome the FDM-PLA-not-food-safe objection.
winners.notes: Food contact concern - must be PETG/resin not standard PLA, with disclaimer on listing.

winners.name: Treasure Chest Nintendo Switch Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Clever treasure chest form for Switch storage; gaming nostalgia drives gifting.
winners.differentiator: Chest form factor without any Nintendo logo is the safer way to capture this audience.
winners.notes: Avoid Nintendo or Switch branding in title; use 'console storage' phrasing.

winners.name: Personalized Cat Food Bowl (Small)
winners.why_it_sells: Custom name adds emotional value; pet owners are highly motivated buyers.
winners.differentiator: Personalisation premium; repeat buyer potential for multi-pet households.
winners.notes: Food contact concern - PLA is not food-safe. Use PETG or add a clear product disclaimer.

winners.name: Little Tikes Rear Numberplate (Replacement)
winners.why_it_sells: Exact replacement for a discontinued toy part; parents desperate to fix a beloved toy.
winners.differentiator: Near-zero competition; buyer urgency is maximum. Strongest argument for the replacement parts niche.
winners.notes: Functional replacement parts are typically tolerated. Avoid Little Tikes wordmark in title.

winners.name: Personalized Charging Cord Organiser
winners.why_it_sells: Personalisation adds gifting value to a mundane object; desk organisation trend ongoing.
winners.differentiator: Low filament cost; easy to customise per order; stocking-filler price point boosts Q4 volume.

winners.name: Tesla Model 3/Y Sunglasses Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Exact-fit interior accessory; Tesla owners are passionate and high-income.
winners.differentiator: Loyal niche community; works in both Model 3 and Y - doubles addressable market; low competition.
winners.notes: Avoid Tesla wordmark or logo in listing title or photos.

winners.name: Jack Stand Phone Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Novelty form factor (car jack) appeals to automotive hobbyists; low price = impulse buy.
winners.differentiator: Concept has more potential with better photography and SEO - still an early-stage listing.

winners.name: Tesla Supercharger Phone Charger Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Nostalgic Tesla Supercharger form factor on a functional object; strong Tesla community gifting.
winners.differentiator: Tesla fandom is active and high-income. Strong gifting angle.
winners.notes: Don't use the Supercharger or Tesla logo. Sell as 'EV charger inspired phone stand'.

winners.name: Snorlax Apple Watch Charger Cover
winners.why_it_sells: Character shape matches Apple Watch puck perfectly; Pokémon fandom is massive and buying.
winners.differentiator: High earner but built on Nintendo IP - listing can be removed at any time. Use as evidence of demand for the format, not as a model to copy.
winners.notes: Cautionary example - Nintendo enforcement is aggressive. Sell an original character instead of copying this.

winners.name: Simpsons Sponge Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Homer's mouth is the perfect sponge slot; viral social share potential; highly recognisable.
winners.differentiator: Strong revenue but one DMCA = shop gone. Use as proof that the 'character mouth holds object' format works - design an original character around the same concept.
winners.notes: Cautionary example. Original character with a similar form factor is the safer play.

winners.name: Super Mario Thwomp Tissue Box Cover
winners.why_it_sells: Viral gaming decor; instantly recognisable character; functional novelty for gamer homes.
winners.differentiator: Nintendo is the most aggressive IP enforcer on Etsy - high suspension risk. Demonstrates demand for 'gaming character as functional household object', not a template to copy.
winners.notes: Cautionary example. Build an original character/creature around the same concept.

winners.name: Avengers Tower Amazon Echo Dot Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Iconic architecture fits Echo Dot perfectly; Marvel fans are passionate and high-spending.
winners.differentiator: Very high revenue potential but suspension risk is real. Format works for any tall iconic landmark.
winners.notes: Cautionary example. Try a generic skyscraper or original architecture instead.

winners.name: Amazon Echo Dot R2-D2 Accessory
winners.why_it_sells: Star Wars fandom; R2-D2 form factor matches Echo Dot shape perfectly.
winners.differentiator: High IP risk. Disney actively enforces Star Wars on Etsy. Use as proof that 'cylindrical character on Echo Dot' works - design an original robot.

winners.name: Mickey Apple Watch Charger Cover
winners.why_it_sells: Character-branded tech accessory; strong gifting angle for Disney fans.
winners.differentiator: High IP risk (Disney). Etsy ban likely if flagged. Demand exists - capture it with an original character.

winners.name: Lightsaber Wall Mount
winners.why_it_sells: Display mount for prop collectors; collectors pay well for quality display solutions.
winners.differentiator: Etsy actively removes Star Wars listings. Generic 'sword display mount' captures most of the same buyers.

winners.name: Baby Rattle Lightsaber
winners.why_it_sells: Geek parent gifting angle; Star Wars fandom is huge.
winners.differentiator: High IP risk (Disney/Lucasfilm). Lower revenue than the equivalent Mjolnir rattle confirms Star Wars enforcement is stricter.

winners.name: Captain Underpants Hypno Ring
winners.why_it_sells: IP-adjacent novelty; low price = impulse buy.
winners.differentiator: Low margin combined with IP risk makes this a poor recommendation. Original-character novelty rings serve the same impulse-buy buyer.

winners.name: Chinese Takeout Box Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Iconic takeout-box silhouette is instantly recognisable; doubles as a novelty kitchen-windowsill planter; viral on TikTok.
winners.differentiator: Top-tier earner in the planter category. Compact form factor cuts ship cost; the recognisable shape does the marketing.

winners.name: Booty Pot / Butt Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Humour + decor crossover dominates Etsy gift search. Adult-novelty sub-niche has loyal repeat buyers.
winners.differentiator: Sustained earner over 5+ years - proves novelty doesn't always burn out if the design is genuinely funny.

winners.name: Cute Book-Shaped Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Reader/book-lover gift demographic + house-plant trend = double niche. Aesthetic shelfie-ready.
winners.differentiator: Top earner in the dataset for any planter. Targets a buyer the generic geometric planters don't reach.

winners.name: Hands Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Sculptural form factor with broad decorative appeal; cradling-hands silhouette photographs well from every angle.
winners.differentiator: Evergreen seller across 4+ years; works in any decor style.

winners.name: Curvy Female Body Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Sculptural human-form planter; gift-buyer favourite; photographs beautifully on a shelf.
winners.differentiator: Long-tail evergreen seller. Variants (different body shapes, sizes) compound the original SKU.

winners.name: Car Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Niche planter aimed at car enthusiasts and dads. Crosses planter buyers with automotive gift buyers.
winners.differentiator: Double-niche product captures buyers from a category (automotive gifts) that planter sellers ignore.

winners.name: Wall Mount Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Solves the small-apartment problem - planters without floor space. Renter-friendly mounting.
winners.differentiator: Functional planter category is far less saturated than decorative; buyers are problem-solving, not browsing.

winners.name: Happy Face Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Smiley/Y2K aesthetic is on-trend with Gen Z desk decor.
winners.differentiator: Trend-aware design tapping the Y2K nostalgia wave; pairs well with similar-aesthetic accessories.
winners.ip_holder: Smiley Company (the official Smiley logo is trademarked, generic happy face is fine)
winners.notes: Use a generic happy face design, not the Smiley wordmark or registered trademark.

winners.name: Coffee Love Planter
winners.why_it_sells: Coffee-themed gifts is a huge gift category; planters cross over into the cafe-decor crowd.
winners.differentiator: Niche-of-a-niche - coffee lovers who also like plants. Specific buyer = less competition.

winners.name: Cowboy Boot Vase
winners.why_it_sells: Western/cowboycore aesthetic is having a moment. Specific vase shape converts on Pinterest and TikTok.
winners.differentiator: Trend-aware niche product; shippable in flat-pack mode lowers logistics cost.

winners.name: Curvy Plant Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Sculptural plant stand for indoor plants; complements not competes with planters.
winners.differentiator: Adjacent product to planters; same buyer, different SKU = AOV uplift if bundled.

winners.name: Pendant Lampshade Amber
winners.why_it_sells: Amber/warm-glow lighting is trending in home decor; pendant format is one of the highest-AOV lamp types.
winners.differentiator: Premium pendant tier (€60+) with low competition vs the saturated table-lamp segment.

winners.name: TORO Mid-Century Table Lamp
winners.why_it_sells: Mid-century-modern aesthetic is evergreen on Etsy. Lamp at €90+ commands a strong margin.
winners.differentiator: Distinct silhouette + named design (TORO) lets the seller defend the brand if knock-offs appear.

winners.name: TODAI Mid-Century Table Lamp
winners.why_it_sells: Minimalist mid-century lamp aesthetic. Targets the design-conscious buyer who wouldn't buy from IKEA.
winners.differentiator: Premium pricing on a fast-printable design; named SKU helps brand recognition.

winners.name: Polyhedragon Dragon Dice Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Original dragon-themed dice holder for the DnD market - dragon obsession is core to the audience.
winners.differentiator: Original sculptural design; not a generic dragon. Mechanical/sculptural design serves as a moat.

winners.name: Dice Tower with Storage Box
winners.why_it_sells: Dice tower + storage in one piece solves a real DnD-table problem; fewer SKUs the buyer has to assemble.
winners.differentiator: Combo design hits two buyer needs in one purchase, lifting AOV vs separate dice tower + bag.

winners.name: Dog-Shaped Wedding Ring Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Wedding ring bearer + pet-owner sentimentality = high-emotion gift. Personalisation lifts AOV.
winners.differentiator: Cross-niche product hits both wedding and pet-gift buyers. Engraving makes it premium-priced and one-of-a-kind.

winners.name: LitterBox for Geckos
winners.why_it_sells: Hyper-niche reptile-keeper product solving a real cleanliness problem; low competition.
winners.differentiator: Reptile keepers are an underserved Etsy niche; buyers are passionate and quality-tolerant.

winners.name: Stroodies Original BubbleLoft
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a specific need for betta fish keepers (resting platform near surface). Niche within a niche.
winners.differentiator: Hyper-targeted aquarium product. Original IP that the seller has held for 7+ years. Cult buyer base.

winners.name: Shelf Riser for Display
winners.why_it_sells: Display-shelf risers solve a real problem for collectors and Funko Pop / sneaker fans. High-intent buyer.
winners.differentiator: Functional product with a defined customer (collectors). Variants by size = upsell opportunity.

winners.name: Vinyl Record Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Vinyl is back; collectors need display solutions. Aesthetic over functional - photographs well.
winners.differentiator: Trending category (vinyl resurgence) with low FDM competition vs metal/wood alternatives.

winners.name: Now Playing Vinyl Stand
winners.why_it_sells: 'Now playing' display = active-use product, not just storage. Vinyl owners listen and switch records often.
winners.differentiator: Hybrid storage + display function; the user touches it every listening session, building brand affection.

winners.name: Now Playing Wall-Mount Vinyl Display
winners.why_it_sells: Wall-mounted version targets renters and small-apartment vinyl collectors. Niche-of-a-niche.
winners.differentiator: Variant of the bestselling 'Now Playing' family. Compact ship size keeps margins.

winners.name: Stream Deck Under-Desk Mount
winners.why_it_sells: Streamers and content creators are high-spend buyers. Exact-fit for Elgato Stream Deck = no competition from generic clamps.
winners.differentiator: Niche functional product for a high-income hobby segment. Hardware-specific fit kills knock-offs.
winners.notes: Avoid Elgato or Stream Deck wordmark in the title; use 'fits Stream Deck MK.1/MK.2' phrasing.

winners.name: AirPods Max Deep-Sleep Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a real AirPods Max battery-drain problem (auto-sleep when stored on the stand). Functional + premium buyer.
winners.differentiator: Functional solve, not just decoration. AirPods Max owners are wealthy and loyal.
winners.notes: Avoid AirPods or Apple wordmarks in the title; use 'over-ear headphone stand' phrasing.

winners.name: Personalised Marshall-Style Amp
winners.why_it_sells: Music-lover gift category; Marshall amp aesthetic is universally recognised. Personalisation lifts AOV.
winners.differentiator: Music + gift + personalisation = three buyer intents in one listing. High emotional buy.
winners.notes: Critical: do NOT use the Marshall wordmark, logo or script font. Use 'amp-style speaker' or 'guitar amp inspired' phrasing only.

winners.name: Fidget Ring Spinner
winners.why_it_sells: Wearable-fidget hybrid; satisfies tactile need + jewelry aesthetic. Cross-niche product.
winners.differentiator: Adult fidget category in a wearable form. Lower competition than standard fidget toys.

winners.name: Einstein Aperiodic Tile Set
winners.why_it_sells: Maths/puzzle community discovered the aperiodic Einstein tile in 2023; collectors and educators want a physical set.
winners.differentiator: Niche maths-community product with built-in publicity narrative (the discovery story). Educator buyer = bulk orders.

winners.name: VR Stock for Meta Quest Headsets
winners.why_it_sells: Exact-fit accessory for the Meta Quest line; FPS gamers buy gunstocks to improve aim. Cult community.
winners.differentiator: Hardware-specific fit for a single device family - no generic competitor. VR community is small but devoted.
winners.notes: Avoid Meta/Quest logos; use 'fits Quest 2/3/Pro' phrasing.

winners.name: Apple Watch iPod-Style Case
winners.why_it_sells: Nostalgia tap (classic iPod) on a current device (Apple Watch); retro-tech buyers are passionate gift-givers.
winners.differentiator: Mash-up product hitting two Apple-ecosystem nostalgia waves at once.
winners.notes: Avoid Apple, iPod or click-wheel logos. Use 'retro-MP3-style case' phrasing.

winners.name: Custom Name Charm for Clogs
winners.why_it_sells: Crocs-style clog charms is a huge niche; personalisation lifts conversion and lets you escape generic-charm competition.
winners.differentiator: Adjacent to the Solefully model (Croc charms) but personalised. Lower-volume but higher-margin per unit.
winners.notes: Use 'fits clog-style shoes' phrasing; do not name Crocs in the title.

winners.name: Severed Hand Halloween Decor (Thing-style)
winners.why_it_sells: Wednesday/Addams Family fandom + Halloween Q4 spike = strong seasonal earner.
winners.differentiator: Strong seasonal demand. The hand silhouette itself isn't trademarked, but listings using 'Wednesday' or 'Thing' branding face takedown risk.
winners.notes: Sell as 'severed hand Halloween decor' or 'creepy crawling hand' - avoid Wednesday/Thing/Addams branding.

winners.name: Futurama Amazon Echo Dot Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Beloved-cartoon nostalgia + functional smart-home accessory. Strong Q4 gift demand from millennial buyers.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary example - high revenue, but Fox/Disney enforce on Etsy. The 'cartoon-character holds Echo Dot' format works with original characters.

winners.name: Brave Little Toaster Sponge Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Cult-classic Disney film + functional kitchen object = nostalgia-driven gift. Wide millennial buyer base.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary example. Disney enforces aggressively. Same form factor with an original retro-appliance character avoids the takedown risk.

winners.name: Tesla License Plate Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Tesla owners are loyal, high-income buyers; exact-fit accessories for Model 3/Y are a near-evergreen niche.
winners.differentiator: 5+ years sustained sales prove Tesla niche is durable. Avoid Tesla wordmark or T logo in photos.
winners.notes: Use 'fits Model 3 / Model Y' phrasing; never the Tesla T logo.

winners.name: Aztec Death Whistle Onyx Black Skull
winners.why_it_sells: Novelty noisemaker that went viral on TikTok. Low filament cost; high impulse-buy rate at sub-$5 price.
winners.differentiator: Top eBay 3D-print earner in this dataset by volume (5,800+ units). Variants on 'death whistle' compound the SKU.

winners.name: Aztec Quetzalcoatl Death Whistle
winners.why_it_sells: Themed variant of the death-whistle category - feathered serpent design appeals to a slightly different aesthetic buyer.
winners.differentiator: Demonstrates the depth of the death-whistle niche; variant designs each find their own audience.

winners.name: Glock Rear Sight Pusher Tool
winners.why_it_sells: Universal sight-pusher that fits all Glock models; firearms hobbyists pay for tools that save trips to a gunsmith.
winners.differentiator: Highest sustained eBay revenue in this dataset (3,400+ units sold). Firearms parts are eBay-allowed but Etsy-banned, so eBay is the right channel.
winners.notes: Etsy bans firearms-related listings; this is an eBay-only product. Avoid the Glock wordmark - sell as 'rear sight pusher tool'.

winners.name: Rooflight Security Locks (Heki / Dometic)
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a real motorhome-security problem (rooflight latches are easily forced). Buyers are urgent - they're securing a vehicle they own.
winners.differentiator: Hyper-niche replacement-part product with near-zero competition. Caravan/motorhome owners are a high-LTV repeat-buyer base.

winners.name: Modular Hot Wheels 1:64 Wall Display Shelf
winners.why_it_sells: 1:64 collectors are massive, organised and willing to pay for display solutions. Modular system means buyers come back to extend.
winners.differentiator: Modular product = recurring revenue; the buyer's first 18-car shelf becomes their second and third.
winners.notes: Avoid Hot Wheels or Mattel wordmarks; use 'fits 1:64 scale die-cast cars'.

winners.name: Football Mini Helmet Wall Hanger
winners.why_it_sells: Mini-helmet collectors number in the millions; wall mounts are the missing accessory. Cheap to ship.
winners.differentiator: Low-priced impulse buy with strong repeat-purchase pattern (collectors mount many helmets).

winners.name: Daisy Red Ryder BB Gun Speed Loader
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a tedious problem (loading BBs by hand) for a beloved childhood-gift product (Daisy Red Ryder). Dad-and-kid demographic.
winners.differentiator: eBay-only - Etsy bans BB-gun related listings. Niche-of-a-niche with near-zero competition.
winners.notes: Etsy doesn't allow this category; eBay is the channel. Avoid Daisy or Red Ryder branding.

winners.name: 1/64 Hot Wheels Car Lift
winners.why_it_sells: Diorama accessory for 1:64 collectors. Low-priced impulse buy that pads order value when bought with display shelves.
winners.differentiator: Pairs with the Hot Wheels wall display - upsell opportunity. Repeat buyer category.

winners.name: Pro-Line Body Mount Thumb Screw Nuts (RC, 12-pack)
winners.why_it_sells: RC hobbyists do body-changes constantly; thumb-screw nuts let them swap without a wrench. 12-pack form lifts AOV.
winners.differentiator: Replacement-part-style product in a passionate hobby. Tool-free function is the value prop.
winners.notes: Use 'fits Pro-Line body mounts' phrasing.

winners.name: 3D Galaxy Lamp / Moon Light
winners.why_it_sells: Touch-color-change moon lamp is a TikTok mainstay. Low price, high gift-buy potential.
winners.differentiator: Saturated category but eBay's looser SEO rules let smaller listings still find buyers.

winners.name: Vinyl Record Display Shelf (Wall Mount)
winners.why_it_sells: Vinyl resurgence + apartment-friendly wall mount = huge buyer pool. Sub-$5 price drives volume.
winners.differentiator: Cheaper than the Etsy 'Now Playing' equivalents; competes on volume not premium.

winners.name: Universal Lightsaber Display Stand (Galaxy's Edge)
winners.why_it_sells: Disney Galaxy's Edge legacy-saber collectors are a passionate, high-spend audience. Display stands are the missing accessory.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - high revenue but Disney IP risk is real. Sell as 'sword display mount' to dodge takedowns.

winners.name: Galaxy's Edge Savi's Workshop Kyber Crystal
winners.why_it_sells: Customisation accessory for legacy lightsabers; passionate Star-Wars maker community.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary IP example. Working kyber-crystal effect proves there's demand for original-IP equivalents (e.g. wizard staff crystal).

winners.name: Charging Stand for Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses
winners.why_it_sells: Ray-Ban Meta is the bestselling smart-glasses ever; charging stands are the missing accessory. High-income buyer.
winners.differentiator: Massive earner. Hardware launched ~2024 - first-mover advantage on a popular new device. Premium €46+ price.
winners.notes: Avoid Ray-Ban or Meta wordmarks; use 'fits smart glasses with USB-C cradle' phrasing.

winners.name: DeWALT Battery Caddy / Carrier (6-pack)
winners.why_it_sells: Trade workers and serious DIYers stockpile DeWALT batteries; a 6-slot caddy keeps the van/garage organised.
winners.differentiator: High-volume earner; tradesperson buyer is professional and replaces or expands as fleet grows.
winners.notes: Use 'fits DeWALT 18V/20V Max batteries' phrasing - not DeWalt wordmark.

winners.name: Aquarium Frozen Food Feeding Cup
winners.why_it_sells: Solves a specific aquarist problem (thawing/feeding frozen food without mess). Niche keepers are passionate buyers.
winners.differentiator: Adjacent to the Stroodies BubbleLoft model - hyper-niche aquarium products win.

winners.name: Echo Dot 3rd Gen Outlet Socket Holder
winners.why_it_sells: Frees desk space for Echo Dot 3rd-gen owners. Massive installed base = consistent demand.
winners.differentiator: Older device but evergreen - Amazon doesn't replace ageing Echo Dots quickly. Variant of the HomePod outlet stand model.
winners.notes: Avoid Amazon/Echo wordmarks; use 'fits round smart speakers'.

winners.name: AirTag Under-Bottle Bicycle Mount
winners.why_it_sells: Bike theft is a real, urgent problem; AirTag is the standard tracking solution. Hidden under-bottle mount is the buyer's specific ask.
winners.differentiator: Concealment is the unique value prop - off-the-shelf mounts are visible. Cyclist buyer is high-LTV.
winners.notes: Avoid AirTag/Apple wordmarks; use 'tracker mount under bottle cage'.

winners.name: IKEA DETOLF Shelf Support Clips (12-pack)
winners.why_it_sells: DETOLF is one of IKEA's most popular display cabinets; the original 4 shelves don't satisfy serious collectors. 12-clip pack lets buyers add 3+ shelves.
winners.differentiator: 5+ year sustained seller. Solves a specific IKEA-extension problem; collectors are repeat buyers.
winners.notes: Avoid IKEA wordmark; use 'fits DETOLF cabinet'.

winners.name: Spider-Man Noir Hat (Marvel Legends)
winners.why_it_sells: Action-figure customisers buy 1:12 accessories for figures Marvel never released with a hat. Tiny SKU, big collector market.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - Marvel/Disney enforce. Original-character hat for the same scale figures avoids the IP risk.

winners.name: Heavy Duty Corner Clamp Adapters (Irwin Mini Quick Grip)
winners.why_it_sells: Wood-workers and DIYers extend their existing Irwin clamps to 90-degree corners with a 3D-printed adapter. Cheaper than buying corner clamps.
winners.differentiator: Replacement-style accessory that extends an existing tool. Pairs strongly with eBay's tradesperson buyer base.
winners.notes: Use 'fits Irwin Mini Quick Grip' phrasing.

winners.name: Wall Mount Display for Lego Saturn V
winners.why_it_sells: Adult Lego collectors built a $400+ Saturn V and want to wall-mount it horizontally - the official set lacks a stable display option.
winners.differentiator: High-AOV accessory for a high-AOV product. Lego AFOL (Adult Fan of Lego) buyer is high-income.
winners.notes: Avoid Lego wordmark or trademarked imagery; use 'fits 1969-piece space rocket model'.

winners.name: Motorhome Window Rubber Trim Fitting Tool
winners.why_it_sells: Specific repair tool for caravan/motorhome owners installing replacement window seals. Buyers are urgent and quality-tolerant.
winners.differentiator: Hyper-niche tool with near-zero competition. Repeat purchase across 23mm + 25mm trim variants.

winners.name: Nintendo Switch Piranha Plant Charging Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Mario fans + Switch owners + TikTok virality = three converging niches. Premium €47+ price proves design value.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - massive earner but Nintendo enforces aggressively. Original 'plant-shaped charging stand' avoids the IP risk.

winners.name: F1 / Formula 1 Desk Sign
winners.why_it_sells: Formula-1 fandom is global and growing fast (Drive to Survive effect). Desk decor is an underserved sub-niche.
winners.differentiator: Trend-aware product riding the F1 popularity wave. Avoid Formula 1 logo; sell as 'motorsport desk sign'.
winners.notes: Avoid F1, Formula 1, FIA logos; sell as 'motorsport / racing fan desk sign'.

winners.name: Deadpool & Wolverine Realistic Halloween Mask
winners.why_it_sells: Highest eBay revenue in the Halloween cosplay category. Movie release year (2024) drove demand peak.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - Marvel/Disney enforce. Realistic-mask format works with original characters or generic horror masks.

winners.name: Light-Up Blockbuster Video Decoration Sign
winners.why_it_sells: 90s/00s nostalgia-decor is a huge demographic; Blockbuster brand is defunct so trademark enforcement is dormant.
winners.differentiator: Defunct-brand IP is the safer-than-Disney play. Same retro nostalgia, no active rights-holder pursuing takedowns.
winners.notes: Trademark technically lapsed but original holder's IP partially survives - keep listings safe by avoiding the original logo style.

winners.name: 1:64 Truck Bed Toolbox (Greenlight / M2)
winners.why_it_sells: Diorama accessories for 1:64 die-cast collectors. Pairs with truck models from Greenlight, M2 Machines, GreenLight Hauliers.
winners.differentiator: Sub-$5 impulse buy that grows order value when bundled with display shelves and other diorama pieces.

winners.name: Stitch Cookie Cutter (Disney)
winners.why_it_sells: Disney-character cookie cutters are an enormous birthday-party niche. Stitch fandom is one of the most consistent on Etsy/eBay.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - Disney enforces but cookie cutters often slip through. Generic-shape cutters with the same form factor are the safe play.

winners.name: Aero Downforce Kit (Traxxas Slash, 1967 C10)
winners.why_it_sells: RC drag-truck enthusiasts buy aero kits to tune performance. Specific platform (Traxxas Slash) keeps competition low.
winners.differentiator: Hardware-specific functional product for a passionate hobby segment. €46+ price commands real margin.
winners.notes: Avoid Chevrolet or Traxxas trademarked logos; use 'fits Traxxas Slash, 1967 truck-style body' phrasing.

winners.name: HO-Scale Dumpsters / Pallets / Drums (Set of 15)
winners.why_it_sells: Model railway scenery is an evergreen hobby with high-LTV buyers. Bulk pack of trash items is the missing accessory.
winners.differentiator: Niche-of-a-niche functional category. Buyers come back as their layouts grow.

winners.name: McDonalds Twin In-Car Sauce Holder (DipClip)
winners.why_it_sells: McDonalds dipping sauces in-car is a universal annoyance. DipClip solves it for £6 - perfect impulse buy.
winners.differentiator: Volume play: 834 units sold over 6 years. Generic 'twin sauce holder' phrasing dodges the McDonalds trademark.
winners.notes: Sell as 'twin dipping sauce in-car holder' - never use McDonalds branding.

winners.name: Grey Alien Area 51 Action Figure
winners.why_it_sells: Pop-culture grey-alien iconography has zero IP holder. Halloween + Area 51 conspiracy buyers feed evergreen demand.
winners.differentiator: Original-design action figure with no trademark exposure; the silhouette belongs to no one.

winners.name: BMW E30 Rear Ash Tray Delete Plate
winners.why_it_sells: E30 BMW restorers want to clean up the rear cabin; original ashtray is universally hated. 30+ year old car, evergreen restoration community.
winners.differentiator: Hyper-specific restoration accessory. E30 community is small but obsessive and price-tolerant.
winners.notes: Avoid BMW logo or M3 trademark; use 'fits E30 1984-1991' phrasing.

winners.name: Cupholder for 1984-1996 Jeep XJ Cherokee / MJ Comanche
winners.why_it_sells: XJ Jeep Cherokee restorers are a passionate community; original cup-holder is poor or missing. Premium €47+ price.
winners.differentiator: Replacement-style product for a beloved discontinued vehicle. Premium pricing on a 30+ year old platform.
winners.notes: Avoid Jeep wordmark or grille logo; use 'fits 1984-1996 XJ / MJ' phrasing.

winners.name: Car Drying Nozzle for Milwaukee M18 Fuel Blower
winners.why_it_sells: Auto-detailing and car-care community uses cordless blowers to dry cars; matched nozzle profile beats generic adapters.
winners.differentiator: Cross-niche product (car care + Milwaukee tools). Buyer often owns both ecosystems.
winners.notes: Avoid Milwaukee or M18 wordmarks; use 'fits Milwaukee M18 Fuel Blower' phrasing.

winners.name: Real Ghostbusters Proton Pack & Streams (Set of 4)
winners.why_it_sells: Vintage Kenner Real Ghostbusters action figure customisers; missing accessory for figures from 1986-1991.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - Ghostbusters IP is enforced by Sony. Same 'vintage figure accessory' format works with original franchises.

winners.name: Cessna Throttle Quadrant for Flight Simulators
winners.why_it_sells: Flight-sim hobbyists invest serious money in realism; Cessna-replica throttle is a step up from Logitech generic.
winners.differentiator: Premium €110+ price commands real margin. Flight-sim community is small but extremely high-LTV.
winners.notes: Avoid Cessna wordmark; use 'GA-style throttle quadrant for flight simulators'.

winners.name: Music Gear Stand (Roland, Arturia, Teenage Engineering)
winners.why_it_sells: Synthesizer / groovebox owners stack their gear; matched stands keep things organised. Specific brands lock out generic competition.
winners.differentiator: Variants for each device family (Roland SP-404, Arturia BeatStep, EP-133, Novation Circuit) compound a single SKU into many.

winners.name: Milwaukee M18 Battery Output Adapter (DIY)
winners.why_it_sells: DIY robotics / electronics hobbyists power custom projects from Milwaukee 18V batteries; the adapter is the missing connector.
winners.differentiator: Cross-niche product (Milwaukee + DIY electronics). High-LTV buyer with multiple project ideas.
winners.notes: Avoid Milwaukee or M18 wordmarks; use 'fits 18V power tool batteries'.

winners.name: Sheet Metal Dimple Die Set (Harbor Freight Hydraulic Punch)
winners.why_it_sells: Auto-fab and home-shop metalworkers want lightening-hole dies but commercial sets cost $400+. 3D-printed at $85 wins on price.
winners.differentiator: Premium €79+ price into a working-class buyer base. Pairs with a specific Harbor Freight tool kit.
winners.notes: Avoid Harbor Freight wordmark; use 'fits hydraulic hand punch driver kits' phrasing.

winners.name: Kraken Rum Bottle Holder (700ml)
winners.why_it_sells: Bar/man-cave decor + premium rum brand fans = strong gift demand. Mystical-creature aesthetic photographs well.
winners.differentiator: Premium €53+ price proves design value. Kraken brand has strong opinion-leader following.
winners.notes: Avoid Kraken wordmark or octopus logo; sell as 'tentacle bottle holder for 700ml rum bottles'.

winners.name: Game Boy Color Double Display Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Retro-gaming collectors mount their Game Boys; single console + games-stand combo lifts AOV.
winners.differentiator: Adjacent-niche product (retro display). Generic stand silhouette dodges Nintendo enforcement.
winners.notes: Use 'retro handheld console display stand' phrasing - never name Game Boy or Nintendo.

winners.name: PlayStation 2 Slim Vertical Stand
winners.why_it_sells: Retro-gaming community mounts old consoles vertically to save desk/shelf space. PS2 Slim is one of the most-collected consoles.
winners.differentiator: Generic 'console stand' phrasing keeps it Sony-trademark-safe.
winners.notes: Avoid PS2 / PlayStation wordmarks; use 'fits Sony PS2 Slim'.

winners.name: Pokédex Slab Holder (PSA / CGC / BGS)
winners.why_it_sells: Pokémon TCG-grading community wants themed display for graded cards. Themed buyer overlaps massively with Pokémon TCG buyers.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - Pokémon Company enforces aggressively. Generic 'graded card slab holder' avoids the takedown risk.

winners.name: Voigtlander Nokton VM Lens Hood
winners.why_it_sells: Niche photography accessory; Voigtlander VM lens hood replacements are unavailable from manufacturer.
winners.differentiator: Very small but evergreen niche; rangefinder photography community is loyal.
winners.notes: Sell as 'fits VM-mount 35/40/50mm lenses' - safer than naming Voigtlander directly.

winners.name: 1/64 Scale 3-Car Hauler Trailer
winners.why_it_sells: 1:64 die-cast haulers are a missing accessory for Greenlight Gooseneck collectors. Higher-AOV than basic shelves.
winners.differentiator: Premium accessory for the high-engagement 1:64 collector niche.
winners.notes: Use 'fits Greenlight 1:64 Gooseneck Trailer' phrasing - not Greenlight wordmark.

winners.name: Star Trek Original Phaser Pistol Prop Kit
winners.why_it_sells: Star Trek cosplayers and fans want screen-accurate phaser replicas; Paramount licenced ones are $200+.
winners.differentiator: Cautionary - Paramount enforces. Generic 'sci-fi blaster prop kit' format works with original-IP designs.
